use_cases: Visualize sales or conversion funnels in analytics dashboards
Display user journey drop-off rates with animated metric counters
Track marketing campaign performance with trend indicators
Monitor pipeline stages with real-time animated data
Present business KPIs with upward/downward trend visualization
ai_summary: A data visualization component featuring a funnel chart from the Reaviz library combined with animated CountUp metrics and custom trend indicator icons. Uses framer-motion for smooth transitions and displays performance data with upward (coral) and downward (teal) trend arrows. Designed for analytics dashboards and conversion tracking scenarios.
